[beep] // use the special "beep" variable to make a beeping sound description = Beeps. clear output = [clear] // use the special "clear" variable to clear the screen description = Clear all text from the screen. animal output = {import:animal} description = Gives you a random animal. // Notes: // - command names (like "echo", "shout", "name", above) must not contain spaces // - you can access all the text that was input after the command with [input] (see 'echo' and 'name' commands for example) // - you might want to turn off auto-reload while you edit this generator because it auto-focuses on the command input area with each reload // - you can of course delete any of the commands above if you don't want them name = friend // default user name used in 'hello' command showImageFullscreen(imageUrl) => let overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.style.cssText = `position:fixed; inset:0; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,.8); z-index:9999`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); let img = new Image(); img.src = imageUrl; img.style.cssText = 'max-width:100%; max-height:100%; box-shadow:0 0 20px #000'; let close = document.createElement('div'); close.textContent = '✖'; close.style.cssText = `position:absolute; top:12px; right:16px; font:32px/1 sans-serif; color:#fff; cursor:pointer`; let remove = ()=>overlay.remove(); overlay.onclick = e => (e.target===overlay) && remove(); close.onclick = remove; overlay.append(img, close);

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
  <title>Dream AI</title>
  <link rel="manifest" href="https://progressier.app/HjPMTBI3nngaDUlb9P6G/progressier.json"/>
  <script defer src="https://progressier.app/HjPMTBI3nngaDUlb9P6G/script.js"></script>
  <style>
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@300;500;700&display=swap');

    :root {
      --neon-cyan: #00f3ff;
      --neon-pink: #bc13fe;
      --neon-green: #0aff0a;
      --bg-dark: #020205;
      --midnight-blue: #0b1026;
      --glass-bg: rgba(11,16,38,0.45);
      --glass-border: rgba(0,243,255,0.15);
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
    html { font-size:16px; }

    body {
      background-color: var(--bg-dark);
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(0,243,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,243,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, #1a0b2e 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 90%, #050a1f 0%, transparent 60%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #020205 0%, #080c1f 50%, #020205 100%);
      background-size: 30px 30px, 30px 30px, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%;
      min-height: 100vh;
      font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;
      color: #e0e0e0;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure body allows pointer events */
    }

    .scanlines {
      position:fixed; inset:0;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 2px,rgba(0,0,0,0.07) 2px,rgba(0,0,0,0.07) 4px);
      pointer-events:none; z-index:9999; opacity:0.15;
    }

    .neon-glow { position:fixed; border-radius:50%; filter:blur(60px); opacity:0.18; pointer-events:none; z-index:0; }
    .nc { background:var(--neon-cyan); }
    .np { background:var(--neon-pink); }

    /* GLASS */
    .glass-panel {
      background:var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter:blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
      border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
      box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.7),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      border-radius:16px;
      transition:box-shadow 0.3s,border-color 0.3s;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure glass panels allow pointer events */
    }
    .glass-panel:hover {
      box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,243,255,0.07),0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,243,255,0.12);
      border-color:rgba(0,243,255,0.3);
    }

    /* TYPE */
    h1,h2,h3,h4 { font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; margin:0; }
    .holographic-text {
      background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#00f3ff,#bc13fe,#00f3ff);
      -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
      background-size:100% 200%; animation:holo 3s infinite linear;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(188,19,254,0.4));
    }
    @keyframes holo { 0%{background-position:0% 0%} 100%{background-position:0% 200%} }
    .tc { color:var(--neon-cyan); text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,243,255,0.5); }
    .tp { color:var(--neon-pink); text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(188,19,254,0.5); }
    .tg { color:var(--neon-green); text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(10,255,10,0.5); }
    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:0.5} 50%{opacity:1;text-shadow:0 0 10px var(--neon-pink)} }
    .loading-text { font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; color:var(--neon-pink); animation:pulse 1.5s infinite; }

    /* HEADER */
    header.glass-panel {
      border-bottom:2px solid var(--neon-pink);
      position:relative; z-index:100;
      margin:16px auto; width:clamp(300px,92%,1200px);
      padding:12px 20px;
    }
    .header-inner { text-align:center; }
    .header-accent { height:1px; width:80px; background:var(--neon-cyan); margin:0 auto 8px; box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--neon-cyan); }
    h1.site-title { font-size:clamp(1.4rem,5vw,2.2rem); margin-bottom:4px; }
    .site-sub { font-size:clamp(0.6rem,2vw,0.85rem); color:var(--neon-pink); text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(188,19,254,0.5); letter-spacing:3px; font-weight:300; text-transform:uppercase; }

    /* NAV */
    .nav-container { display:flex; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:2px; padding:8px 0 0; }
    .nav-item {
      padding:6px 14px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
      font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(0.58rem,2vw,0.78rem);
      letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase;
      border-bottom:2px solid transparent; cursor:pointer;
      transition:all 0.2s; white-space:nowrap; border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure nav items are clickable */
    }
    .nav-item:hover,.nav-item.active { color:#fff; border-bottom-color:var(--neon-pink); text-shadow:0 0 8px var(--neon-pink); }

    /* LAYOUT */
    .content-container { width:clamp(300px,92%,1200px); margin:0 auto; flex:1; padding-bottom:60px; pointer-events: auto; }
    .view-section { display:block; }
    .view-section[hidden] { display:none !important; }

    /* BUTTONS */
    .nb {
      background:rgba(0,243,255,0.05); border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan); color:var(--neon-cyan);
      padding:10px 26px;
      clip-path:polygon(8px 0,100% 0,100% calc(100% - 8px),calc(100% - 8px) 100%,0 100%,0 8px);
      cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px;
      font-weight:700; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(0.68rem,2vw,0.88rem);
      display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; white-space:nowrap;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure buttons are clickable */
    }
    .nb:hover:not(:disabled) { background:var(--neon-cyan); color:#000; box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--neon-cyan),0 0 40px rgba(0,243,255,0.3); transform:translateY(-2px); }
    .nb:active:not(:disabled) { transform:scale(0.98); }
    .nb:disabled { opacity:0.4; cursor:not-allowed; filter:grayscale(80%); }
    .nb.pink { border-color:var(--neon-pink); color:var(--neon-pink); background:rgba(188,19,254,0.05); }
    .nb.pink:hover:not(:disabled) { background:var(--neon-pink); color:#000; box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--neon-pink); }
    .nb.sm { padding:6px 14px; font-size:0.65rem; clip-path:polygon(5px 0,100% 0,100% calc(100% - 5px),calc(100% - 5px) 100%,0 100%,0 5px); }
    .nb.full { width:100%; }

    .ab {
      background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan); color:var(--neon-cyan);
      padding:4px 10px; font-size:0.7rem; border-radius:3px; cursor:pointer;
      text-transform:uppercase; font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif; transition:background 0.2s; white-space:nowrap;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure action buttons are clickable */
    }
    .ab:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
    .ab.del { border-color:var(--neon-pink); color:var(--neon-pink); }
    .ab.grn { border-color:var(--neon-green); color:var(--neon-green); }

    /* INPUTS */
    input[type="text"],textarea,select {
      background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
      color:#fff; border-radius:6px; font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;
      font-size:1rem; transition:border-color 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure inputs are usable */
    }
    input[type="text"]:focus,textarea:focus,select:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--neon-cyan); box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,243,255,0.18); }
    select { padding:8px 10px; cursor:pointer; }
    select option { background:var(--midnight-blue); color:#fff; }

    /* GENERATOR */
    .gen-card { padding:clamp(16px,4vw,36px); margin-bottom:32px; border-left:4px solid var(--neon-cyan); }
    .gen-header { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; margin-bottom:20px; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .gen-header h2 { font-size:clamp(1rem,3vw,1.4rem); }
    .v-badge { padding:4px 10px; border:1px solid var(--neon-green); color:var(--neon-green); font-size:0.72rem; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:4px; white-space:nowrap; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; }

    /* MODE TABS */
    .mode-tabs {
      display:flex; gap:5px; margin-bottom:20px;
      background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding:5px; border-radius:8px;
      overflow-x:auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch; scrollbar-width:none;
    }
    .mode-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display:none; }
    .mode-tab {
      flex:1; min-width:90px; background:transparent;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
      padding:9px 6px; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
      font-size:clamp(0.58rem,1.8vw,0.72rem); cursor:pointer;
      border-radius:4px; transition:all 0.2s; text-transform:uppercase; white-space:nowrap;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure mode tabs are clickable */
    }
    .mode-tab:hover { color:#fff; border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }
    .mode-tab.active { background:rgba(0,243,255,0.1); border-color:var(--neon-cyan); color:var(--neon-cyan); }

    /* UPLOAD */
    .upload-area {
      border:2px dashed var(--glass-border); background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
      border-radius:8px; padding:18px; text-align:center;
      margin-bottom:16px; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; position:relative;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure upload area is clickable */
    }
    .upload-area:hover { border-color:var(--neon-cyan); background:rgba(0,243,255,0.04); }
    .upload-area input[type="file"] { position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:0; cursor:pointer; width:100%; height:100%; }
    .upload-preview { max-width:120px; max-height:120px; border-radius:4px; margin-top:10px; display:none; border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan); }

    /* PROMPT */
    .prompt-wrap { position:relative; margin-bottom:14px; }
    .prompt-label { display:block; margin-bottom:6px; color:var(--neon-cyan); font-weight:700; font-size:0.88rem; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; letter-spacing:1px; }
    textarea#promptInput { width:100%; padding:13px 68px 13px 13px; min-height:88px; resize:vertical; }
    .enhance-btn {
      position:absolute; right:8px; top:8px;
      background:rgba(188,19,254,0.14); border:1px solid var(--neon-pink);
      color:var(--neon-pink); padding:5px 8px; border-radius:4px;
      cursor:pointer; font-size:0.62rem; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
      text-transform:uppercase; transition:all 0.2s; letter-spacing:1px;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure enhance button is clickable */
    }
    .enhance-btn:hover { background:var(--neon-pink); color:#000; }
    .enhance-btn:disabled { opacity:0.4; cursor:not-allowed; }

    /* CUSTOMIZE */
    .cust-section { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.22); border:1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius:10px; padding:14px; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .cust-header { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:12px; padding-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border); gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .cust-header h3 { font-size:clamp(0.72rem,2vw,0.9rem); }
    .cust-btns { display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .cust-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(min(100%,260px),1fr)); gap:12px; }

    .cat-box { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
    .cat-head { 
      background:rgba(0,243,255,0.07); padding:10px 12px; cursor:pointer; 
      display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; 
      transition:background 0.2s; border-left:3px solid transparent;
      pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure category headers are clickable */
    }
    .cat-head:hover { background:rgba(0,243,255,0.12); }
    .cat-head.open { background:rgba(0,243,255,0.16); border-left-color:var(--neon-cyan); }
    .cat-head h4 { color:var(--neon-cyan); font-size:clamp(0.68rem,2vw,0.82rem); letter-spacing:1px; }
    .cat-arrow { color:var(--neon-cyan); font-size:0.72rem; transition:transform 0.3s; }
    .cat-head.open .cat-arrow { transform:rotate(180deg); }
    .cat-body { max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition:max-height 0.35s ease-out; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.22); }
    .cat-body.open { max-height:600px; overflow-y:auto; }
    .cat-body::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .cat-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--neon-cyan); border-radius:2px; }
    .cat-row { padding:9px 11px 9px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
    .cat-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .cat-row-label { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-size:0.78rem; display:block; margin-bottom:4px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
    .cat-row select { width:100%; padding:7px 8px; font-size:0.84rem; }

    /* CONTROLS */
    .ctrl-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:16px; }
    .ctrl-row select { flex:1; min-width:130px; }

    /* OUTPUT GRID */
    .out-grid { display:grid; gap:14px; margin-top:18px; }
    .out-grid.n1 { grid-template-columns:1fr; max-width:480px; }
    .out-grid.n2 { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .out-grid.n3 { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); }

    .img-card { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.38); border:1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
    .img-card-inner { position:relative; min-height:180px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding:5px; }
    .img-card-inner img { width:100%; display:block; }
    .card-loading,.card-error { font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.72rem; padding:30px; text-align:center; }
    .card-error { color:var(--neon-pink); }
    .img-card-actions { display:flex; gap:5px; padding:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border); }
    .img-card-actions .ab { flex:1; min-width:50px; text-align:center; padding:5px 4px; }

    /* FEATURES */
    .feat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(min(100%,210px),1fr)); gap:16px; margin-top:28px; }
    .feat-item { padding:20px 18px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; transition:all 0.3s; }
    .feat-item::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:2px; height:100%; background:var(--neon-cyan); opacity:0.5; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
    .feat-item:hover::before { opacity:1; box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--neon-cyan); }
    .feat-item:hover { background:rgba(0,243,255,0.04); transform:translateY(-4px); }
    .feat-item h3 { font-size:clamp(0.82rem,2.5vw,1.05rem); margin-bottom:8px; }
    .feat-div { width:26px; height:2px; background:var(--neon-pink); margin-bottom:10px; }
    .feat-item p { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.62); line-height:1.5; font-size:0.88rem; }

    /* CHARACTERS */
    .char-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(min(100%,148px),1fr)); gap:14px; }
    .char-card { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.28); border:1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius:8px; padding:10px; text-align:center; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.25s; }
    .char-card:hover { border-color:var(--neon-pink); transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(188,19,254,0.14); }
    .char-img { width:100%; height:130px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:5px; margin-bottom:8px; display:block; }
    .char-ph { width:100%; height:130px; background:rgba(0,243,255,0.06); border-radius:5px; margin-bottom:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.8rem; }
    .char-card h4 { color:#fff; font-size:0.75rem; margin-bottom:3px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; }
    .char-card p { font-size:0.72rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.38); margin-bottom:7px; overflow:hidden; display:-webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp:2; -webkit-box-orient:vertical; }
    .char-acts { display:flex; gap:4px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    /* CHAT */
    .chat-wrap { display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:clamp(380px,68vh,680px); }
    .chat-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding-bottom:12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border); margin-bottom:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .chat-av { width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--neon-cyan); object-fit:cover; flex-shrink:0; }
    .chat-av-ph { width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--neon-cyan); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.2rem; background:rgba(0,243,255,0.07); flex-shrink:0; }
    .chat-name-el { color:var(--neon-cyan); font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(0.78rem,2.5vw,0.96rem); }
    .chat-status-el { font-size:0.72rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }
    .chat-head-acts { margin-left:auto; display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    .chat-hist { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:10px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18); border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; scroll-behavior:smooth; }
    .chat-hist::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .chat-hist::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--neon-cyan); border-radius:2px; }

    .msg { max-width:80%; padding:9px 12px; border-radius:10px; line-height:1.45; font-size:0.9rem; word-break:break-word; }
    .msg.user { align-self:flex-end; background:rgba(0,243,255,0.11); border:1px solid rgba(0,243,255,0.22); border-bottom-right-radius:2px; }
    .msg.ai { align-self:flex-start; background:rgba(188,19,254,0.11); border:1px solid rgba(188,19,254,0.22); border-bottom-left-radius:2px; }
    .msg-time { display:block; font-size:0.66rem; opacity:0.3; margin-top:3px; }

    .chat-input-row { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:stretch; }
    .chat-input-row input { flex:1; padding:10px 12px; min-width:0; }
    .chat-tools { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    /* MODALS */
    .modal-overlay { position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.86); backdrop-filter:blur(6px); z-index:5000; display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; opacity:0; pointer-events:none; transition:opacity 0.25s; padding:14px; }
    .modal-overlay.open { opacity:1; pointer-events:auto; } /* Fixed: changed from 'all' to 'auto' */
    .modal-box { background:var(--midnight-blue); border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan); box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,243,255,0.14); width:min(100%,560px); max-height:90vh; overflow-y:auto; padding:clamp(16px,4vw,26px); border-radius:14px; position:relative; }
    .modal-box::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
    .modal-box::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--neon-cyan); border-radius:2px; }
    .modal-close { position:absolute; top:11px; right:13px; background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--neon-pink); font-size:1.4rem; cursor:pointer; line-height:1; z-index:1; }
    .modal-close:hover { text-shadow:0 0 8px var(--neon-pink); }

    .char-prev-img { width:88px; height:88px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--neon-cyan); object-fit:cover; display:block; margin:0 auto 14px; box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(0,243,255,0.22); }
    .char-prev-ph { width:88px; height:88px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--neon-cyan); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.8rem; margin:0 auto 14px; background:rgba(0,243,255,0.06); }

    .form-g { margin-bottom:12px; }
    .form-g label { display:block; color:var(--neon-cyan); margin-bottom:4px; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.78rem; }
    .form-g input[type="text"],.form-g textarea { width:100%; padding:9px 10px; }
    .form-g textarea { min-height:76px; resize:vertical; }

    .toggle-row { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
    .toggle-sw { display:flex; align-items:center; cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0; }
    .tg-inp { display:none; }
    .tg-sl { width:36px; height:19px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius:20px; position:relative; transition:background 0.3s; }
    .tg-sl::before { content:''; position:absolute; width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:50%; background:#fff; top:2.5px; left:2.5px; transition:transform 0.3s; }
    .tg-inp:checked + .tg-sl { background:var(--neon-green); }
    .tg-inp:checked + .tg-sl::before { transform:translateX(17px); }

    /* SETTINGS */
    .set-section { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.22); border:1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius:10px; padding:16px; margin-top:14px; }
    .set-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; }
    .set-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .set-lbl { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.82); font-size:0.88rem; }
    .set-desc { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.38); font-size:0.72rem; margin-top:2px; }
    .set-acts { display:flex; gap:7px; flex-wrap:wrap; }

    /* TOAST */
    #toast { position:fixed; bottom:22px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:9998; padding:9px 20px; border-radius:6px; font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif; font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:1px; pointer-events:none; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; white-space:nowrap; }
    #toast.show { opacity:1; }
    #toast.success { background:rgba(10,255,10,0.11); border:1px solid var(--neon-green); color:var(--neon-green); }
    #toast.error { background:rgba(188,19,254,0.11); border:1px solid var(--neon-pink); color:var(--neon-pink); }
    #toast.info { background:rgba(0,243,255,0.09); border:1px solid var(--neon-cyan); color:var(--neon-cyan); }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer.glass-panel {
      width:clamp(300px,92%,1200px); margin:20px auto 14px;
      display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
      padding:13px 22px; border-top:1px solid rgba(0,243,255,0.22);
      flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;
    }
    .foot-copy { font-size:0.8rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width:580px) {
      .out-grid.n2,.out-grid.n3 { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      .ctrl-row select { flex:1 1 100%; }
      .chat-head-acts { width:100%; }
      .msg { max-width:94%; }
      .chat-input-row { flex-direction:column; }
      .chat-input-row .nb { width:100%; }
      .set-acts { width:100%; }
      footer.glass-panel { justify-content:center; text-align:center; }
      .char-acts { justify-content:center; }
    }
    @media (max-width:380px) {
      .mode-tab { min-width:76px; font-size:0.56rem; padding:7px 3px; }
      .nav-item { padding:5px 7px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<script>
'use strict';

// ─── STATE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var S = {
  mode: 't2i',
  uploadedData: null,
  lastPrompt: '',
  lastImgs: [],
  chatId: null
};

// ─── TOAST ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function toast(msg, type='info', ms=2600) {
  const el = document.getElementById('toast');
  if (!el) { console.warn('Toast element not found'); return; }
  el.textContent = msg; el.className = `show ${type}`;
  clearTimeout(el._t);
  el._t = setTimeout(() => { el.className = ''; }, ms);
}

// ─── STORE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Store = {
  K: 'dreamai_v1',
  all() { 
    try { 
      return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(this.K)||'{}'); 
    } catch(e) { 
      console.error('Storage read error:', e);
      return {}; 
    } 
  },
  get(k, fb=null) { 
    try {
      const d=this.all(); return k in d ? d[k] : fb; 
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Storage get error:', e);
      return fb;
    }
  },
  set(k, v) {
    const d=this.all(); d[k]=v;
    try { 
      localStorage.setItem(this.K, JSON.stringify(d)); 
    } catch(e) { 
      console.error('Storage write error:', e);
      toast('Storage full — export data!','error'); 
    }
  },
  exportJSON() {
    const b = new Blob([JSON.stringify(this.all(),null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
    this._dl(b,`dreamai-${_date()}.json`); toast('Exported!','success');
  },
  async saveToFile() {
    const b = new Blob([JSON.stringify(this.all(),null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
    if ('showSaveFilePicker' in window) {
      try {
        const h = await window.showSaveFilePicker({ suggestedName:`dreamai-${_date()}.json`, types:[{description:'JSON',accept:{'application/json':['.json']}}] });
        const w = await h.createWritable(); await w.write(b); await w.close();
        toast('Saved!','success'); return;
      } catch(e) { if (e.name==='AbortError') return; console.error('Save file error:', e); }
    }
    this._dl(b,`dreamai-${_date()}.json`); toast('Downloaded!','success');
  },
  importJSON() {
    const inp = document.createElement('input'); inp.type='file'; inp.accept='.json';
    inp.onchange = async e => {
      const f = e.target.files[0]; if(!f) return;
      try { 
        const t = await f.text(); 
        JSON.parse(t); // Validate JSON
        localStorage.setItem(this.K,t); 
        Chars.render(); 
        toast('Imported!','success'); 
      } catch(e) { 
        console.error('Import error:', e);
        toast('Invalid file.','error'); 
      }
    };
    inp.click();
  },
  clearAll() {
    if(!confirm('Delete ALL data? This cannot be undone.')) return;
    localStorage.removeItem(this.K); 
    Chars.render(); 
    S.chatId=null; 
    toast('Cleared.','info');
  },
  _dl(blob, name) { 
    try {
      const u=URL.createObjectURL(blob),a=document.createElement('a'); 
      a.href=u; 
      a.download=name; 
      a.click(); 
      URL.revokeObjectURL(u);
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Download error:', e);
      toast('Download failed. Right-click and save instead.','error');
    }
  }
};

function _date() { return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); }

// ─── SETTINGS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Sett = {
  save() {
    try {
      Store.set('sett', {
        remPrompt: document.getElementById('s_remPrompt')?.checked || false,
        autoSave: document.getElementById('s_autoSave')?.checked || false
      });
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Settings save error:', e);
    }
  },
  load() {
    try {
      const s = Store.get('sett',{});
      const remPromptEl = document.getElementById('s_remPrompt');
      const autoSaveEl = document.getElementById('s_autoSave');
      
      if (remPromptEl && s.remPrompt!=null) remPromptEl.checked = s.remPrompt;
      if (autoSaveEl && s.autoSave!=null) autoSaveEl.checked = s.autoSave;
      
      if (s.remPrompt) { 
        const p=Store.get('lastPrompt',''); 
        const promptEl = document.getElementById('promptInput');
        if(p && promptEl) promptEl.value=p; 
      }
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Settings load error:', e);
    }
  }
};

// ─── UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var UI = {

// ─── CUSTOMIZE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Cust = {

    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-body').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('open'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-head').forEach(h=>h.classList.remove('open'));
  },
  reset() { 
    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-row select').forEach(s=>s.value='');

  build() {
    const ids=['c_bodyShape','c_skinTone','c_breastSize','c_clothing','c_footwear','c_acc','c_face','c_eyeColor','c_eyeShape','c_hairColor','c_hairStyle','c_lips','c_loc','c_light','c_atm','c_tod','c_weather','c_paint','c_colors','c_qual','c_artmv'];
    return ids.map(i=>document.getElementById(i)?.value||'').filter(Boolean).join(', ');

};

// ─── MODES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function setMode(mode) {

      t2i:['DESCRIPTION PROMPT','✦ Initialize Generation','Describe your AI girl... e.g. cyberpunk warrior, neon lights, purple hair'],
      i2i:['TRANSFORMATION PROMPT','✦ Transform Image','Describe how to transform the uploaded image...'],

    if (mode==='t2v'||mode==='i2v') vB.hidden=false;

// ─── UPLOAD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleUpload(input) {
  try {
    if (!input.files?.[0]) return;
    const r=new FileReader();
    r.onload=e=>{
      S.uploadedData=e.target.result;
      const pr=document.getElementById('uploadPrev'), ph=document.getElementById('uploadPh');
      if (pr) {
        pr.src=e.target.result; 
        pr.style.display='block'; 
      }
      if (ph) ph.style.display='none';
    };
    r.onerror = () => {
      toast('Failed to read image file', 'error');
    };
    r.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
  } catch(e) {
    console.error('Upload error:', e);
    toast('Upload failed', 'error');
  }

// ─── ENHANCE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function enhancePrompt() {
  const pEl=document.getElementById('promptInput'), btn=document.getElementById('enhanceBtn');
  if (!pEl || !btn) { toast('UI elements not found','error'); return; }
  
  const raw=pEl.value.trim(); 
  if(!raw){toast('Enter a prompt first.','error');return;}
  
  btn.disabled=true; 
  btn.textContent='...';
  
  try {
    // Check if generateText is available
    if (typeof generateText !== 'function') {
      throw new Error('Text generation not available');
    }
    
    const res = await generateText({
      messages:[{role:'user',content:`You are a Stable Diffusion prompt engineer. Enhance this prompt for a beautiful AI girl image. Keep the core idea. Add lighting, quality, style, and atmosphere details. Return ONLY the enhanced prompt, nothing else.\n\nOriginal: ${raw}`}]
    });
    const txt=(res?.text||res?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||res||'').trim();
    if(txt){
      pEl.value=txt;
      toast('Prompt enhanced!','success');
    } else{
      toast('Enhancement returned empty.','error');
    }
  } catch(e){
    console.error(e); 
    toast('Enhancement failed. Please try again.','error');
  } finally{
    btn.disabled=false; 
    btn.textContent='✦ ENHANCE';
  }
}

// ─── GENERATION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var NEG='cartoon,anime,manga,drawing,illustration,3d render,cgi,painting,sketch,disney,pixar,low quality,blurry,deformed,ugly,text,watermark,child,childlike,underage';

function _buildPrompt() {
  const promptEl = document.getElementById('promptInput');
  const styleSelect = document.getElementById('styleSelect');
  if (!promptEl || !styleSelect) return 'beautiful woman';
  
  const base=promptEl.value.trim()||'beautiful woman';
  const cust=Cust.build();
  const style=styleSelect.value;
  const parts=[base];
  if(cust) parts.push(cust);
  if(style) parts.push(style);
  parts.push('photorealistic,highly detailed,8k,masterpiece,best quality');
  return parts.join(', ');
}

async function generate() {
  try {
    if((S.mode==='i2i'||S.mode==='i2v')&&!S.uploadedData){
      toast('Upload a source image first.','error');
      return;
    }

    // Check if generateImage is available
    if (typeof generateImage !== 'function') {
      throw new Error('Image generation not available');
    }

    const btn=document.getElementById('genBtn'), lbl=document.getElementById('genLabel');
    const numSelect = document.getElementById('numSelect');
    const resSelect = document.getElementById('resSelect');
    const outGrid = document.getElementById('outGrid');
    
    if (!btn || !lbl || !numSelect || !resSelect || !outGrid) {
      toast('UI elements not found','error');
      return;
    }

    const num=parseInt(numSelect.value);
    const [w,h]=resSelect.value.split('x').map(Number);
    const prompt=_buildPrompt();
    S.lastPrompt=prompt;
    
    if(Store.get('sett',{}).remPrompt) {
      Store.set('lastPrompt',document.getElementById('promptInput').value);
    }

    btn.disabled=true; 
    lbl.textContent='NEURAL CORE FIRING...'; 
    lbl.className='loading-text';

    outGrid.innerHTML='';
    outGrid.className=`out-grid n${num}`;
    outGrid.style.display='grid';

    for(let i=0;i<num;i++){
      const card=document.createElement('div');
      card.className='img-card'; 
      card.id=`card${i}`;
      card.innerHTML=`<div class="img-card-inner" id="inner${i}"><div class="card-loading"><div class="loading-text" style="font-size:0.7rem;">GENERATING...</div></div></div><div class="img-card-actions" id="acts${i}" style="display:none;"></div>`;
      outGrid.appendChild(card);
    }

    const jobs=Array.from({length:num},(_,i)=>_genSlot(i,prompt,w,h));
    await Promise.allSettled(jobs);

    btn.disabled=false; 
    lbl.textContent=S.mode==='t2i'?'✦ Initialize Generation':'✦ Transform Image'; 
    lbl.className='';
  } catch(e) {
    console.error('Generate error:', e);
    toast('Generation failed: ' + (e.message || 'Unknown error'), 'error');
    
    // Reset button state
    const btn=document.getElementById('genBtn'), lbl=document.getElementById('genLabel');
    if (btn && lbl) {
      btn.disabled=false; 
      lbl.textContent=S.mode==='t2i'?'✦ Initialize Generation':'✦ Transform Image'; 
      lbl.className='';
    }
  }
}

// Helper function to extract URL from various response formats
function _extractUrlFromResponse(res) {
  // Case 1: Direct string (data URL or HTTP URL)
  if (typeof res === 'string' && res && res.trim() !== '') {
    return res.trim();
  }
  
  // Case 2: Null or undefined
  if (!res) {
    return '';
  }
  
  // Case 3: Object with various URL properties
  if (typeof res === 'object') {
    // Check common URL property names
    const urlProps = ['url', 'imageUrl', 'image', 'data', 'src', 'output', 'result'];
    for (const prop of urlProps) {
      if (res[prop] && typeof res[prop] === 'string') {
        return res[prop];
      }
    }
    
    // Check for arrays of results
    if (Array.isArray(res.images) && res.images[0]) {
      if (typeof res.images[0] === 'string') return res.images[0];
      if (res.images[0].url) return res.images[0].url;
      if (res.images[0].imageUrl) return res.images[0].imageUrl;
    }
    if (Array.isArray(res.data) && res.data[0]) {
      if (typeof res.data[0] === 'string') return res.data[0];
      if (res.data[0].url) return res.data[0].url;
      if (res.data[0].imageUrl) return res.data[0].imageUrl;
    }
    
    // Deep search for URLs in object values
    const findUrlInObj = (obj, depth = 0) => {
      if (depth > 5) return ''; // Prevent infinite recursion
      for (const key in obj) {
        const val = obj[key];
        if (typeof val === 'string') {
          if (val.startsWith('http://') || val.startsWith('https://') || val.startsWith('data:image')) {
            return val;
          }
        } else if (typeof val === 'object' && val !== null && !Array.isArray(val)) {
          const found = findUrlInObj(val, depth + 1);
          if (found) return found;
        }
      }
      return '';
    };
    
    const deepUrl = findUrlInObj(res);
    if (deepUrl) return deepUrl;
  }
  
  return '';
}

async function _genSlot(idx,prompt,w,h) {
  const inner=document.getElementById(`inner${idx}`), acts=document.getElementById(`acts${idx}`);
  if (!inner || !acts) return;
  
  try {
    // Build the full prompt with negative prompts appended
    const fullPrompt = `${prompt}. Negative prompts to avoid: ${NEG}`;
    
    const options = {
      resolution: `${w}x${h}`
    };

    console.log(`[Slot ${idx}] Generating with resolution ${w}x${h}`);
    console.log(`[Slot ${idx}] Prompt:`, fullPrompt.substring(0, 200) + '...');
    
    // Call generateImage with error handling
    let res;
    try {
      res = await generateImage(fullPrompt, options);
    } catch (apiError) {
      console.error(`[Slot ${idx}] API Error:`, apiError);
      throw new Error(apiError.message || 'Generation API failed');
    }
    
    console.log(`[Slot ${idx}] Raw response type:`, typeof res);
    console.log(`[Slot ${idx}] Raw response:`, res);
    
    // Extract URL using helper function
    const url = _extractUrlFromResponse(res);
    
    console.log(`[Slot ${idx}] Extracted URL:`, url ? url.substring(0, 50) + '...' : 'NONE');
    
    if (!url) {
      console.error(`[Slot ${idx}] No URL found in response:`, res);
      throw new Error('No image URL in response. The API returned an unexpected format.');
    }
    
    // Detect if this is a video/gif by checking URL extension
    const isVideo = /\.(mp4|webm|mov|gif)(\?|$)/i.test(url);

    S.lastImgs[idx]={url,prompt,type:isVideo?'video':'image'};

    // Correct Logic: output [image(prompt)] <br> [lastTextToImagePrompt]
    // We ensure flex-direction: column on the inner element so the BR stacks content vertically.
    inner.style.flexDirection = 'column';

    let mediaHtml = '';
    if(isVideo) {
      mediaHtml = `<video src="${url}" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%; max-height:160px; object-fit:contain;"></video>`;
    } else {
      mediaHtml = `<img src="${url}" alt="Generated ${idx+1}" loading="lazy" style="width:100%; max-height:160px; object-fit:contain;">`;
    }

    // The text element (lastTextToImagePrompt) styled to fit the theme
    const promptTextHtml = `<div style="width:100%; text-align:center; font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--neon-cyan); background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding:4px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; box-sizing:border-box; margin-top:5px;">${prompt}</div>`;

    inner.innerHTML = `${mediaHtml}<br>${promptTextHtml}`;
    
    acts.style.display='flex';
    acts.innerHTML=`<button class="ab" onclick="_retry(${idx})">↺ Retry</button><button class="ab grn" onclick="_dl(${idx})">⬇ Save</button><button class="ab" onclick="_mkChar(${idx})">+ Char</button>`;
  } catch(e) {
    console.error(`[Slot ${idx}] Error:`, e);
    inner.innerHTML=`<div class="card-error">FAILED<br><small style="opacity:0.55;font-size:0.62rem;">${e.message||'Unknown error'}</small></div>`;
    acts.style.display='flex';
    acts.innerHTML=`<button class="ab" onclick="_retry(${idx})">↺ Retry</button>`;
  }
}

async function _retry(idx) {
  if(!S.lastPrompt){toast('Generate first.','error');return;}
  const resSelect = document.getElementById('resSelect');
  if (!resSelect) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
  
  const [w,h]=resSelect.value.split('x').map(Number);
  const inner=document.getElementById(`inner${idx}`), acts=document.getElementById(`acts${idx}`);
  if (!inner || !acts) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
  
  inner.innerHTML=`<div class="card-loading"><div class="loading-text" style="font-size:0.7rem;">RETRYING...</div></div>`;
  acts.style.display='none';
  await _genSlot(idx,S.lastPrompt,w,h);
}

function _dl(idx) {
  const img=S.lastImgs[idx]; 
  if(!img?.url) return;
  
  try {
    const a=document.createElement('a'); 
    a.href=img.url; 
    // Determine extension based on type or URL
    let ext = 'png';
    if(img.type === 'video' || /\.(mp4|webm|mov|gif)/i.test(img.url)) {
       ext = img.url.match(/\.(mp4|webm|mov|gif)/i)?.[1] || 'mp4';
    }
    a.download=`dreamai-${Date.now()}.${ext}`; 
    a.target='_blank'; 
    a.click();
  } catch(e) {
    console.error('Download error:', e);
    toast('Download failed. Right-click image to save.', 'error');
  }
}

function _mkChar(idx) {
  const img=S.lastImgs[idx]; 
  if(!img?.url){toast('No image.','error');return;}
  Creator.open(img.url,img.prompt);
}

// ─── CREATOR MODAL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Creator = {
  _url: null, _prompt: '', // Fixed: Corrected syntax error here
  open(url,prompt) {
    try {
      this._url=url||null; 
      this._prompt=prompt||'';
      
      const cName = document.getElementById('cName');
      const cPersonality = document.getElementById('cPersonality');
      const cGreeting = document.getElementById('cGreeting');
      const creatorPrevEl = document.getElementById('creatorPrevEl');
      const creatorModal = document.getElementById('creatorModal');
      
      if (cName) cName.value='';
      if (cPersonality) cPersonality.value='';
      if (cGreeting) cGreeting.value='';
      
      if (creatorPrevEl) {
        creatorPrevEl.innerHTML=url?`<img src="${url}" class="char-prev-img" alt="Preview">`:`<div class="char-prev-ph">✦</div>`;
      }
      if (creatorModal) creatorModal.classList.add('open');
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Creator open error:', e);
      toast('Failed to open creator', 'error');
    }
  },
  close() { 
    const creatorModal = document.getElementById('creatorModal');
    if (creatorModal) creatorModal.classList.remove('open'); 
  },
  async autoGen() {
    if(!this._prompt){toast('No prompt context.','error');return;}
    const btn=document.querySelector('#creatorModal .nb.pink'); 
    if (!btn) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
    
    btn.disabled=true; 
    btn.textContent='Generating...';
    
    try {
      // Check if generateText is available
      if (typeof generateText !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Text generation not available');
      }
      
      const res=await generateText({messages:[{role:'user',content:`Based on this image prompt: "${this._prompt.slice(0,300)}"\nGenerate a character profile. Format EXACTLY:\nNAME: [name]\nPERSONALITY: [2-3 sentences personality and backstory]\nGREETING: [a short greeting they'd say]`}]});
      const txt=(res?.text||res?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||res||'').trim();
      const nm=txt.match(/NAME:\s*(.+)/i), pe=txt.match(/PERSONALITY:\s*([\s\S]+?)(?=GREETING:|$)/i), gr=txt.match(/GREETING:\s*(.+)/i);
      
      const cName = document.getElementById('cName');
      const cPersonality = document.getElementById('cPersonality');
      const cGreeting = document.getElementById('cGreeting');
      
      if(nm && cName) cName.value=nm[1].trim();
      if(pe && cPersonality) cPersonality.value=pe[1].trim();
      if(gr && cGreeting) cGreeting.value=gr[1].trim();
      
      toast('Personality generated!','success');
    } catch(e){
      console.error(e); 
      toast('AI generation failed. Please try again.','error');
    } finally{
      btn.disabled=false; 
      btn.textContent='✦ AI Generate Personality';
    }
  },
  save() {
    try {
      const cName = document.getElementById('cName');
      const cPersonality = document.getElementById('cPersonality');
      const cGreeting = document.getElementById('cGreeting');
      
      if (!cName) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
      
      const name=cName.value.trim();
      if(!name){toast('Enter a name!','error');return;}
      
      const char={
        id:'c'+Date.now(),
        name,
        personality:cPersonality?.value.trim()||'A mysterious AI girl.',
        greeting:cGreeting?.value.trim()||'',
        image:this._url||null,
        createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),
        chatHistory:[]
      };
      
      const chars=Store.get('chars',[]); 
      chars.push(char); 
      Store.set('chars',chars);
      
      this.close(); 
      toast(`${name} initialized!`,'success'); 
      Chars.render();
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Creator save error:', e);
      toast('Failed to save character', 'error');
    }
  }
};

// ─── EDITOR MODAL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Editor = {
  open(id) {
    try {
      const c=Chars.byId(id); 
      if(!c) return;
      
      const eId = document.getElementById('eId');
      const eName = document.getElementById('eName');
      const ePersonality = document.getElementById('ePersonality');
      const eGreeting = document.getElementById('eGreeting');
      const editPrevEl = document.getElementById('editPrevEl');
      const editModal = document.getElementById('editModal');
      
      if (eId) eId.value=id;
      if (eName) eName.value=c.name;
      if (ePersonality) ePersonality.value=c.personality||'';
      if (eGreeting) eGreeting.value=c.greeting||'';
      
      if (editPrevEl) {
        editPrevEl.innerHTML=c.image?`<img src="${c.image}" class="char-prev-img" alt="${_esc(c.name)}">`:`<div class="char-prev-ph">✦</div>`;
      }
      if (editModal) editModal.classList.add('open');
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Editor open error:', e);
      toast('Failed to open editor', 'error');
    }
  },
  close() { 
    const editModal = document.getElementById('editModal');
    if (editModal) editModal.classList.remove('open'); 
  },
  save() {
    try {
      const eId = document.getElementById('eId');
      const eName = document.getElementById('eName');
      const ePersonality = document.getElementById('ePersonality');
      
      if (!eId || !eName) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
      
      const id=eId.value, 
            name=eName.value.trim();
      
      if(!name){toast('Name required.','error');return;}
      
      Chars.update(id,{
        name,
        personality:ePersonality?.value.trim()||'',
        greeting:document.getElementById('eGreeting')?.value.trim()||''
      });
      
      this.close(); 
      toast('Updated!','success'); 
      Chars.render();
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Editor save error:', e);
      toast('Failed to save changes', 'error');
    }
  }
};

// ─── CHARS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Chars = {
  all() { return Store.get('chars',[]); },
  byId(id) { return this.all().find(c=>c.id===id)||null; },
  update(id,up) {
    const a=this.all(), i=a.findIndex(c=>c.id===id); 
    if(i===-1) return;
    a[i]={...a[i],...up}; 
    Store.set('chars',a);
  },
  remove(id) {
    if(!confirm('Remove this character?')) return;
    Store.set('chars',this.all().filter(c=>c.id!==id));
    if(S.chatId===id) S.chatId=null;
    this.render(); 
    toast('Removed.','info');
  },
  render() {
    try {
      const el=document.getElementById('charList'), chars=this.all();
      if(!el) return;
      
      if(!chars.length){
        el.innerHTML=`<p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.36);grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:40px;font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;font-size:0.74rem;">NO CHARACTERS FOUND.<br><br>Generate an image and click "+ Char".</p>`;
        return;
      }
      
      el.innerHTML=chars.map(c=>`
        <div class="char-card">
          ${c.image?`<img src="${_esc(c.image)}" class="char-img" alt="${_esc(c.name)}" loading="lazy">`:`<div class="char-ph">✦</div>`}
          <h4 title="${_esc(c.name)}">${_esc(c.name)}</h4>
          <p>${_esc((c.personality||'').slice(0,60))}${(c.personality||'').length>60?'...':''}</p>
          <div class="char-acts">
            <button class="ab grn" onclick="Chat.open('${c.id}')">Chat</button>
            <button class="ab" onclick="Editor.open('${c.id}')">Edit</button>
            <button class="ab del" onclick="Chars.remove('${c.id}')">✕</button>
          </div>
        </div>`).join('');
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Chars render error:', e);
    }
  }
};

function _esc(s){return String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"');}

// ─── CHAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var Chat = {
  open(id) { S.chatId=id; UI.switch('chat'); },
  renderView() {
    try {
      const iface=document.getElementById('chatIface'), noChar=document.getElementById('noChatChar');
      const c=Chars.byId(S.chatId);
      
      if(!c){
        if(iface) iface.style.display='none';
        if(noChar) noChar.style.display='block';
        return;
      }
      
      if(iface) iface.style.display='block'; 
      if(noChar) noChar.style.display='none';
      
      const chatNameEl = document.getElementById('chatNameEl');
      const chatStatEl = document.getElementById('chatStatEl');
      const avEl = document.getElementById('chatAvEl');
      
      if(chatNameEl) chatNameEl.textContent=c.name;
      if(chatStatEl) chatStatEl.textContent='Online';
      
      if(avEl) {
        avEl.innerHTML=c.image?`<img src="${_esc(c.image)}" class="chat-av" alt="${_esc(c.name)}">`:`<div class="chat-av-ph">✦</div>`;
      }
      
      this._render(c);
      if(!c.chatHistory?.length&&c.greeting){
        this._add(c,'ai',c.greeting);
        Chars.update(c.id,{chatHistory:c.chatHistory});
      }
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Chat render error:', e);
    }
  },
  _render(c) {
    try {
      const el=document.getElementById('chatHist'), hist=c.chatHistory||[];
      if(!el) return;
      
      if(!hist.length){
        el.innerHTML=`<p style="text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);font-size:0.76rem;padding:20px;font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;">START A CONVERSATION...</p>`;
        return;
      }
      
      el.innerHTML=hist.map(m=>`<div class="msg ${m.role}">${_esc(m.content).replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}<span class="msg-time">${new Date(m.ts).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</span></div>`).join('');
      el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Chat _render error:', e);
    }
  },
  _add(c,role,content){
    if(!c.chatHistory)c.chatHistory=[];
    c.chatHistory.push({role,content,ts:Date.now()});
    this._render(c);
  },
  async send() {
    try {
      const chatInput = document.getElementById('chatInput');
      const chatHist = document.getElementById('chatHist');
      
      if(!chatInput || !chatHist) { toast('UI error','error'); return; }
      
      const txt=chatInput.value.trim();
      if(!txt||!S.chatId) return;
      
      const c=Chars.byId(S.chatId); 
      if(!c) return;
      
      chatInput.value=''; 
      chatInput.disabled=true;
      
      this._add(c,'user',txt);
      
      const th=document.createElement('div'); 
      th.className='msg ai'; 
      th.id='thinking';
      th.innerHTML='<span class="loading-text" style="font-size:0.76rem;">...</span>';
      chatHist.appendChild(th); 
      chatHist.scrollTop=chatHist.scrollHeight;
      
      try {
        // Check if generateText is available
        if (typeof generateText !== 'function') {
          throw new Error('Text generation not available');
        }
        
        const sys=`You are ${c.name}. Personality: ${c.personality||'A mysterious AI girl.'}\nStay fully in character. Be conversational and expressive. Never break character or mention being an AI.`;
        const hist=(c.chatHistory||[]).filter(m=>m.role==='user'||m.role==='assistant').slice(-20).map(m=>({role:m.role==='user'?'user':'assistant',content:m.content}));
        
        const res=await generateText({messages:[{role:'system',content:sys},...hist]});
        const reply=(res?.text||res?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||res||'').trim();
        
        const thinking = document.getElementById('thinking');
        if(thinking) thinking.remove();
        
        if(reply){
          this._add(c,'assistant',reply);
          Chars.update(c.id,{chatHistory:c.chatHistory});
        }
      } catch(e){
        console.error(e); 
        const thinking = document.getElementById('thinking');
        if(thinking) thinking.remove();
        toast('Chat error. Check console.','error');
        c.chatHistory.pop(); 
        this._render(c);
      } finally{
        chatInput.disabled=false;
        chatInput.focus();
      }
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Chat send error:', e);
      toast('Failed to send message', 'error');
    }
  },
  async genScene() {
    try {
      const c=Chars.byId(S.chatId); 
      if(!c) return;
      
      toast('Generating scene...','info');
      
      // Check if generateImage is available
      if (typeof generateImage !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Image generation not available');
      }
      
      const p=`${c.name}, ${(c.personality||'').slice(0,100)}, cinematic scene, highly detailed, 8k`;
      
      const res=await generateImage(`${p}. Avoid: ${NEG}`, { resolution: "512x768" });
      const url = _extractUrlFromResponse(res);
      
      if(url) this._injectImg(url);
    } catch(e){
      console.error(e); 
      toast('Scene failed. Please try again.','error');
    }
  },
  async genSceneCtx() {
    try {
      const c=Chars.byId(S.chatId); 
      if(!c){toast('No character active.','error');return;}
      
      const recent=(c.chatHistory||[]).slice(-6).map(m=>m.content).join(' ');
      if(!recent){this.genScene();return;}
      
      toast('Generating scene from context...','info');
      
      // Check if generateText is available
      if (typeof generateText !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Text generation not available');
      }
      
      // Check if generateImage is available
      if (typeof generateImage !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Image generation not available');
      }
      
      const tr=await generateText({messages:[{role:'user',content:`Write a Stable Diffusion prompt for this scene. Visual details only. Return ONLY the prompt.\n\nChat: ${recent.slice(0,400)}\nCharacter: ${c.name} — ${(c.personality||'').slice(0,100)}`}]});
      const sp=(tr?.text||tr?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||tr||`${c.name}, ${(c.personality||'').slice(0,80)}, cinematic`).trim();
      
      const res=await generateImage(`${sp}, highly detailed, 8k. Avoid: ${NEG}`, { resolution: "512x768" });
      const url = _extractUrlFromResponse(res);
      
      if(url) this._injectImg(url);
    } catch(e){
      console.error(e); 
      toast('Scene failed. Please try again.','error');
    }
  },
  _injectImg(url){
    try {
      const el=document.getElementById('chatHist');
      if(!el) return;
      
      const d=document.createElement('div'); 
      d.className='msg ai'; 
      d.style.padding='6px';
      d.innerHTML=`<img src="${url}" style="max-width:100%;border-radius:6px;display:block;" loading="lazy"><a href="${url}" download="scene.png" style="display:block;text-align:center;margin-top:5px;color:var(--neon-cyan);font-size:0.68rem;font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;">⬇ SAVE SCENE</a>`;
      el.appendChild(d); 
      el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;
    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Inject image error:', e);
    }
  },
  clearHist() {
    if(!S.chatId) return;
    if(!confirm('Clear all chat history?')) return;
    Chars.update(S.chatId,{chatHistory:[]});
    const c=Chars.byId(S.chatId); 
    this._render(c); 
    toast('Memory cleared.','info');
  }
};

(function initApp() {
  try {
    console.log('Initializing Dream AI...');
    Sett.load();
    setMode('t2i');
    console.log('Dream AI initialized successfully');
  } catch(e) {
    console.error('Initialization error:', e);
    // Try to show a user-friendly message
    setTimeout(() => {
      toast('App initialized with errors. Some features may not work.', 'error');
    }, 1000);
  }
})();
